title: Executive Summary Generator
prompt_text: Review the attached [DOCUMENT_TYPE] and create a 1-page executive summary highlighting: key findings, business implications, recommended actions, and any risks. Organize by priority and use bullet points for clarity.
description: Distills lengthy documents into actionable exec summaries for leadership review.
tips: Copilot works best with structured documents; for unstructured text, provide context clues about audience and use case. Avoid asking for "all details in summary format" as this defeats the purpose.

title: Meeting to Action Items
prompt_text: I have a meeting transcript from [MEETING_TYPE] about [TOPIC]. Extract: who owns each action, deadlines, blockers, and decisions made. Format as a table with Owner | Action | Deadline | Status. Flag any missing accountability.
description: Converts meeting notes into trackable action items with clear ownership and deadlines.
tips: Mention specific roles or names in the transcript if available; Copilot will pick them up more reliably. For recurring meetings, ask about standing items versus new actions.

title: Theme Detection Across Documents
prompt_text: Scan these [NUMBER] documents and identify recurring themes, patterns, or concerns. Group by theme and note how many documents mention each. Highlight any themes that contradict each other.
description: Reveals patterns and consensus across multiple inputs for insight discovery.
tips: Paste short excerpts or document names with brief context; Copilot may miss nuance in very long inputs. Works best with 3-10 sources.

title: Risk and Issue Identification
prompt_text: Review this [DOCUMENT_TYPE] and flag any risks, issues, or red flags. For each, rate Severity (High/Medium/Low) and Likelihood (High/Medium/Low), and suggest a mitigation or next step.
description: Proactively surfaces business risks embedded in documents or conversations.
tips: Provide context about your risk appetite; Copilot will calibrate severity ratings. Be explicit about what "risk" means in your domain (financial, reputational, operational).

title: Comparison and Delta Analysis
prompt_text: Compare these two [DOCUMENT_TYPE]s and show me the deltas: what's new, what's removed, what's changed. Format as three columns: Added | Removed | Modified. Highlight material differences only.
description: Quickly identifies what has changed between versions for review and approval workflows.
tips: Copilot handles version-to-version well; for before/after narratives, be explicit about which is which. Use this before signing off on updates.

title: Email Thread Summarizer
prompt_text: Summarize this email thread: identify the original problem, proposals offered, objections raised, and current status. Who still needs to respond? What is the decision point?
description: Distills long email chains into decision-ready briefs for leaders.
tips: Copy/paste the entire thread; Copilot will follow the conversation flow. Useful before jumping into an ongoing thread to get up to speed.

title: Stakeholder Position Mapping
prompt_text: From this [DOCUMENT_TYPE or MEETING_TRANSCRIPT], map stakeholder positions: who supports what, who has concerns, and where is consensus? Format as a table: Stakeholder | Position | Concerns | Influence Level.
description: Visualizes organizational alignment and identifies where negotiation is needed.
tips: Name stakeholders explicitly if possible; Copilot will anchor on real names better than pronouns. Useful for pre-meeting planning.

title: Document Consolidation
prompt_text: I have [NUMBER] related documents about [TOPIC]. Consolidate them into one coherent brief, removing duplicates, reconciling conflicting info, and organizing by [SECTION_STRUCTURE]. Call out any unresolved contradictions.
description: Merges multiple inputs into a single source of truth for distributed teams.
tips: Provide a suggested structure upfront; Copilot will follow it more precisely. Name the documents so you can refer back to source.

title: Metrics and KPI Extraction
prompt_text: Extract all metrics, KPIs, and numerical targets from this [DOCUMENT_TYPE]. Create a table with: Metric Name | Current Value | Target | Unit | Owner. Flag any metrics without owners or targets.
description: Identifies measurement framework embedded in business documents for dashboard design.
tips: Copilot works best when metrics have explicit values; for qualitative targets, ask it to infer quantifiable proxies. Useful for OKR setting.

title: Competitive Positioning Summary
prompt_text: From these [NUMBER] sources about our competitors, summarize: what do they do well, where are gaps, how are we positioned against each? Highlight our differentiation opportunities.
description: Synthesizes competitive intelligence into strategy-ready briefs.
tips: Provide recent market research or news articles; Copilot will synthesize across sources. Ask for specific dimensions (pricing, features, service) for clearer comparison.

title: Content Drafting from Notes
prompt_text: Using these notes: [NOTES], draft a [DOCUMENT_TYPE] for [AUDIENCE] about [TOPIC]. Organize by [STRUCTURE], use [TONE], and ensure it answers [KEY_QUESTION]. Include a clear call-to-action.
description: Transforms raw notes into polished deliverables for communication and alignment.
tips: Start with a clear structure in mind (e.g., problem-solution-next-steps); Copilot will follow it. Specify tone explicitly: formal, conversational, technical, etc.

title: Multi-Source Content Synthesis
prompt_text: I have [NUMBER] sources covering [TOPIC]. Synthesize them into a [DOCUMENT_TYPE] for [AUDIENCE] that resolves contradictions, highlights consensus, and provides actionable insight. Use an [OUTLINE_STRUCTURE].
description: Merges research and inputs into cohesive narratives for reports and briefs.
tips: Paste or name each source; Copilot tracks provenance. Useful for white papers, market briefs, and strategy documents.

title: Refinement and Polish
prompt_text: Review this [DOCUMENT_TYPE] for: flow, clarity, redundancy, and impact. Revise for a [SENIORITY_LEVEL] audience, tighten by [PERCENTAGE]%, and improve visual hierarchy. Preserve all content intent.
description: Enhances existing drafts for publication readiness and stakeholder reception.
tips: Copilot is good at tightening; specify the % reduction you need. For very long docs, ask for section-by-section feedback first.

title: Tone and Voice Adjustment
prompt_text: This [DOCUMENT_TYPE] is currently [CURRENT_TONE]. Rewrite it in [TARGET_TONE] while keeping all information intact. The audience is [AUDIENCE] and the use case is [USE_CASE].
description: Adapts messaging to audience expectations without losing substance.
tips: Give examples of the target tone if possible; Copilot will match style better. Useful for executive summaries (from technical docs) or vice versa.

title: Audience Adaptation
prompt_text: Adapt this [DOCUMENT_TYPE] for [TARGET_AUDIENCE] (currently written for [ORIGINAL_AUDIENCE]). Adjust: technical depth, terminology, examples, and emphasis to match [AUDIENCE_NEED/CONCERN].
description: Reframes messaging for different stakeholder groups from a single draft.
tips: Describe what the new audience cares about (e.g., CFO wants ROI, ops wants feasibility); Copilot will emphasize accordingly. Useful for multi-stakeholder rollouts.

title: Email-to-Proposal Conversion
prompt_text: From this email exchange about [TOPIC], extract the proposal and expand it into a formal proposal document for [DECISION_MAKER]. Include: executive summary, detailed scope, timeline, investment, and next steps.
description: Escalates informal agreements into formal documents for contracts and approval.
tips: Ensure all key deal terms are in the email thread; Copilot will pull and structure them. Useful before legal review.

title: Version Merging and Reconciliation
prompt_text: I have [NUMBER] versions of [DOCUMENT_TYPE] from different authors. Merge them into one coherent document that incorporates all contributions. Preserve distinct insights and flag conflicting statements.
description: Consolidates collaborative drafts without losing authorial input.
tips: List authors so Copilot can track perspectives; useful for pre-review merges. Ask for a reconciliation table if conflicts are significant.

title: Outline Expansion
prompt_text: I have a [DOCUMENT_TYPE] outline: [OUTLINE]. Expand each section with 2-3 paragraphs of substantial content on [TOPIC] for [AUDIENCE]. Use [TONE] and include [SPECIFIC_ELEMENTS].
description: Turns skeletal outlines into first-draft prose for faster authoring.
tips: Provide an outline structure and key talking points; Copilot will flesh out. Review the output for accuracy in technical sections.

title: Brand Voice Consistency Check
prompt_text: Review this [DOCUMENT_TYPE] against our brand guidelines: [GUIDELINES_SUMMARY]. Adjust language, tone, examples, and messaging to align with [BRAND_ATTRIBUTE]. Maintain all factual content.
description: Ensures marketing and corporate messaging reflects brand identity consistently.
tips: Provide brand guidelines, brand book excerpts, or past examples; Copilot will learn your voice. Useful for multi-author communications.

title: Trend Identification
prompt_text: Analyze this [DATA_TYPE]: [DATA or FILE_REFERENCE]. Identify trends over time (or across [DIMENSION]). For each trend: describe the direction, note the magnitude of change, and suggest a business implication.
description: Reveals directional patterns in data for decision-making and strategy.
tips: Provide dates or time periods if available; Copilot works better with context. For noisy data, ask for moving average or smoothed interpretation.

title: What-If Scenario Analysis
prompt_text: Given this baseline [DATA/ASSUMPTION]: [INPUT], model what happens if [SCENARIO_A], [SCENARIO_B], and [SCENARIO_C]. Show impact on [KEY_METRIC] as: current state, scenario outcome, % change.
description: Explores decision impact without re-running complex models.
tips: Frame scenarios clearly: best case, worst case, most likely. Copilot will reason through cause-effect; review math for critical decisions.

title: Data Quality Assessment
prompt_text: Assess the quality of this [DATA_TYPE]: [DATA]. Check for: completeness (% missing), consistency (format, values), accuracy (obvious errors), and timeliness (age of data). Rate overall quality and suggest cleanup priorities.
description: Determines fitness of data for decision-making and identifies remediation needs.
tips: Provide context about the data source and use case; Copilot will prioritize quality issues. Useful before relying on data for major decisions.

title: Comparison Across Groups
prompt_text: Compare [METRIC] across [DIMENSION]: [VALUES]. Show performance of each group: absolute value, rank, and performance vs. average. Highlight winners, laggards, and why the gaps might exist.
description: Benchmarks performance within and between groups for accountability and learning.
tips: Provide context about each group (geography, team, product); Copilot will suggest relevant comparisons. Useful for dashboard design and team scorecards.

title: Forecasting and Extrapolation
prompt_text: Given this historical [DATA_TYPE] from [TIME_PERIOD]: [DATA], forecast [METRIC] for [FUTURE_PERIOD]. Note assumptions, confidence level, and key drivers of the forecast.
description: Projects future performance based on historical patterns and trends.
tips: Copilot can extrapolate trends but should not be your primary forecasting tool for critical decisions. Use this for directional planning; validate with statistical models.

title: Segmentation and Clustering
prompt_text: Segment this [DATA_TYPE] by [DIMENSION]. Identify natural clusters or groupings based on [CRITERIA]. For each segment: size, key characteristics, and business relevance or action.
description: Reveals distinct groups within a population for targeted strategy.
tips: Copilot will suggest reasonable segments; validate against your business model. Useful for targeting, messaging, and resource allocation.

title: Root Cause Analysis
prompt_text: We're seeing [SYMPTOM/PROBLEM] in [METRIC]. Walk through the factors that could cause this: [DIMENSIONS or FACTORS]. Which factors changed recently? Which are most likely culprits?
description: Diagnoses the drivers behind business problems for targeted solutions.
tips: Use 5-Whys or fishbone structure; ask Copilot to walk through each branch. Review findings against recent changes (system, process, market) for validation.

title: Risk Scoring Framework
prompt_text: Create a risk score for [ENTITY_TYPE]: [ENTITIES]. Consider: [RISK_FACTORS]. For each entity, rate: likelihood (1-5), impact (1-5), and derive risk score (likelihood × impact). Rank and prioritize.
description: Operationalizes risk assessment for portfolio management and compliance.
tips: Define what each factor means (e.g., late payment = 3/5); Copilot will score consistently. Use this with governance reviews.

title: Dashboard Design Recommendation
prompt_text: For this [USE_CASE/AUDIENCE], recommend a dashboard structure. What [NUMBER] metrics matter most? How should they be organized? What granularity (daily, weekly, monthly)? Suggest 2-3 visualizations.
description: Blueprints effective dashboards aligned with user needs and decision workflows.
tips: Describe the user (what decisions they make, what they check weekly); Copilot will suggest relevant metrics. Review for actionability and timeliness.

title: Email Drafting
prompt_text: Draft a professional email about [TOPIC] to [RECIPIENT/ROLE]. Purpose: [PURPOSE]. Tone: [TONE]. Include: [KEY_POINTS]. Keep it to [SENTENCE_COUNT] sentences.
description: Jumpstarts email writing for busy professionals.
tips: Specify purpose clearly (inform, request, escalate); Copilot will adjust tone. Useful for high-stakes emails; always review before sending.

title: Meeting Preparation
prompt_text: I have a meeting with [ATTENDEES] about [TOPIC]. Prepare: key questions to ask, talking points, and success criteria. Context: [BACKGROUND]. What should I have ready?
description: Ensures productive meetings with clear objectives and prepared inputs.
tips: Describe your goals and any known tensions; Copilot will suggest discussion paths. Useful for 1:1s, negotiations, and leadership meetings.

title: Project Status Report
prompt_text: Summarize the status of [PROJECT]: [DESCRIPTION]. Report on: progress (% complete, key milestones hit), blockers, risks, and next 2 weeks of work. Format as: Summary | Progress | Risks | Next Steps.
description: Standardizes status communication for governance and leadership visibility.
tips: Use a template each week for consistency; Copilot will learn your project context. Useful for steering committee reports.

title: Decision Matrix
prompt_text: We need to decide between [OPTION_A], [OPTION_B], and [OPTION_C] on [DECISION_TOPIC]. Create a decision matrix: criteria (e.g., cost, timeline, risk), score each option, weight criteria, and recommend.
description: Structures decision-making for teams and reduces analysis paralysis.
tips: Define criteria that matter (financial, strategic, operational) upfront; Copilot will score. Useful for procurement, vendor selection, and strategy choices.

title: Presentation Outline
prompt_text: Create a presentation outline for [TOPIC] to [AUDIENCE]. Goal: [GOAL]. Format: [SLIDE_STRUCTURE]. Include: opening hook, [NUMBER] key messages, supporting evidence, and close. Time: [DURATION].
description: Scaffolds presentations from concept to detailed outline.
tips: Provide context about audience seniority and familiarity with topic; Copilot will adjust depth. Use this before opening PowerPoint.

title: Stakeholder Communication Plan
prompt_text: For this initiative [DESCRIPTION], create a communication plan. Who needs to know? What message for each stakeholder? When and how to communicate? Format as: Stakeholder | Message | Channel | Timing.
description: Ensures alignment and reduces surprises during change initiatives.
tips: List stakeholders by type (impacted, decision-maker, supporter, resistant); Copilot will suggest tailored messages. Useful for organizational changes.

title: Weekly Digest Creation
prompt_text: Create a weekly digest for [AUDIENCE] covering: [TOPICS]. Include: what happened this week, what matters, what to watch, and ask (what do you need?). Keep to [LENGTH].
description: Reduces email volume and improves team alignment on priorities.
tips: Collect inputs from team; Copilot will synthesize. Send on a consistent day/time for habit formation. Useful for cross-functional teams.

title: Feedback Synthesis
prompt_text: I've gathered feedback from [NUMBER] people on [TOPIC]. Synthesize: common themes, areas of consensus, key concerns, and recommendations. Group feedback by [DIMENSION].
description: Identifies actionable insights from feedback and surveys.
tips: Share representative quotes; Copilot will categorize. Useful for product, service, and culture feedback review.

title: Constraint Analysis
prompt_text: We're trying to [GOAL] but facing constraints: [CONSTRAINTS]. Analyze each constraint: is it real or perceived, how could we work around it, and what are the trade-offs? Rank by impact.
description: Challenges assumptions and uncovers hidden opportunities in constrained situations.
tips: Distinguish between policy constraints and hard limits; Copilot will focus on addressable ones. Useful for creative problem-solving sessions.

title: Executive Leader Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for an executive leader who needs: fast briefings on strategic topics, board-ready content, competitive intelligence synthesis, and quick decisions on major investments. Include: tone preferences, output formats, key contexts, and gotchas to avoid.
description: Personalizes Copilot for executive workflows and communication style.
tips: Build the template; user refines based on first few uses. Covers reporting style, preferred brevity, risk tolerance, and decision-support needs.

title: HR Business Partner Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for an HR Business Partner supporting [BUSINESS_UNIT]. Focus: workforce planning, org design advice, people metrics, and employee relations guidance. Include: confidentiality guardrails, tone (empathetic, analytical), and compliance checks.
description: Configures Copilot for HR workflows while maintaining confidentiality and compliance.
tips: Emphasize people sensitivity; Copilot should flag privacy concerns. Include guidance on when to involve legal/compliance.

title: Data Analyst Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a data analyst who needs: data validation checks, SQL/Python code generation, visualization recommendations, and statistical guidance. Include: accuracy standards, acceptable tools, limitations of Copilot analysis, and when to escalate to expert.
description: Tunes Copilot for analytical rigor and appropriate use of AI-assisted coding.
tips: Specify tools used (Excel, Python, SQL); Copilot will adjust suggestions. Include guardrails on model validation and assumption checking.

title: Marketing Manager Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a marketing manager. Focus: campaign strategy, content ideation and drafting, audience insights, and competitive positioning. Include: brand voice, approval workflows, channel preferences, and measurement mindset.
description: Aligns Copilot with marketing workflows and brand standards.
tips: Provide brand guidelines and past campaign examples; Copilot learns voice. Include approval workflows (draft → review → execute).

title: Procurement Analyst Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a procurement analyst. Focus: vendor evaluation, contract analysis, spend insights, and sourcing strategy. Include: risk tolerance, approval thresholds, compliance requirements, and escalation criteria.
description: Configures Copilot for procurement workflows within governance frameworks.
tips: Include company policies (signing authority, vendor scorecards, preferred suppliers); Copilot will reference. Add compliance checklist (conflict of interest, ethics).

title: Project Manager Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a project manager. Focus: planning, risk management, schedule analysis, and status communication. Include: project context, milestone structure, reporting cadence, and escalation criteria.
description: Personalizes Copilot for project management and governance communication.
tips: Describe your project portfolio and reporting style; Copilot will tailor. Include templates for status, risk, and change logs.

title: Real Estate Manager Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a real estate manager. Focus: lease analysis, portfolio optimization, space planning, and cost management. Include: market context, financial criteria, sustainability goals, and decision framework.
description: Optimizes Copilot for real estate portfolio management and analysis.
tips: Provide lease templates and portfolio structure; Copilot learns your deals. Include sustainability and ESG priorities.

title: Communications Lead Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for a communications lead. Focus: messaging, audience adaptation, internal/external narrative, and crisis communication. Include: brand voice, tone guidelines, approval chains, and off-limit topics.
description: Configures Copilot for communications workflows with brand and compliance controls.
tips: Provide brand book, past communications, and style guide; Copilot will learn tone. Add compliance guardrails (legal, ethics, crisis protocols).

title: Learning & Development Lead Custom Instructions
prompt_text: Set up Copilot for an L&D professional. Focus: learning design, content creation, skill assessment, and capability building. Include: learning philosophy, audience diversity, delivery modality, and measurement approach.
description: Tailors Copilot for instructional design and learning effectiveness.
tips: Describe your learner population and preferred delivery (classroom, digital, blended); Copilot will adjust content and pacing. Include accessibility requirements.

title: Job Description Refinement
prompt_text: Review this job description for [ROLE]. Improve clarity, accuracy, and appeal to candidates. Check for: inclusive language, clear requirements vs. nice-to-haves, and competitive positioning. Is this attractive to top talent?
description: Strengthens job descriptions for better candidate fit and application quality.
tips: Remove jargon; use inclusive language. Compare to external postings for competitiveness. Test with hiring manager on priorities.

title: Screening Criteria Development
prompt_text: For this [ROLE], create screening criteria: must-haves (deal-breakers), strong-haves (differentiate top candidates), and nice-to-haves. Format as: Criteria | Must-Have | Strong-Have | Assessment Method.
description: Standardizes candidate evaluation and reduces bias in screening.
tips: Align criteria with job description and hiring manager input. Use behavioral anchors (e.g., "managed team of 5+") instead of subjective terms.

title: Offer Negotiation Guidance
prompt_text: A candidate for [ROLE] countered our offer: [COUNTER_OFFER_DETAILS]. Our target: [TARGET_SALARY/TERMS]. Provide negotiation strategy: what to concede, what to hold firm on, and how to close.
description: Guides offer negotiations to close strong hires while managing budget.
tips: Know your walkaway point before negotiating; Copilot will suggest trade-offs. For confidential offers, maintain anonymity in queries.

title: Candidate Assessment Summary
prompt_text: I've interviewed [NUMBER] candidates for [ROLE]. Summary: [CANDIDATE_NOTES from multiple interviews]. Compare: fit for role, cultural fit, readiness, risk factors. Recommend top [NUMBER] for next round.
description: Synthesizes interview feedback to support hiring decisions.
tips: Use consistent notes from each interview; Copilot will compare fairly. Include any red flags or standout strengths from interviewers.

title: Performance Review Framework
prompt_text: Create a performance review framework for [ROLE_FAMILY]. Include: [NUMBER] competencies with 3-5 levels each (e.g., Beginner→Expert), behavioral anchors for each level, and rating scale. Format for clarity.
description: Standardizes performance evaluation across the organization.
tips: Use actual role examples; Copilot will help calibrate levels. Test with managers; iterate on clarity and fairness of levels.

title: Review Comments Improvement
prompt_text: Review these performance comments for [EMPLOYEE]: [COMMENTS]. Are they specific, behavioral, and constructive? Rewrite any that are vague, subjective, or demotivating. Preserve all feedback intent.
description: Ensures performance feedback is actionable and development-focused.
tips: Flag generalizations ("good job", "not a culture fit"); Copilot will make concrete. Useful before sharing with employees.

title: Calibration Guidance
prompt_text: Our manager gave [NUMBER] employees in [TEAM/DEPARTMENT] these ratings: [RATING_DISTRIBUTION]. Is this distribution reasonable? What patterns suggest potential bias or inconsistency?
description: Identifies rating distribution anomalies that signal bias or unfair assessment.
tips: Compare to peer departments and company benchmarks; Copilot will flag outliers. Useful during calibration sessions to guide discussion.

title: Succession Planning Input
prompt_text: For this [ROLE], identify high-potential successors from our team. Criteria: performance level, readiness, development needs, timeline to ready. Recommend development actions for top candidates.
description: Builds pipeline of internal talent for key positions.
tips: Use performance and skill data; Copilot will assess readiness. Consider retention risk for top candidates; plan development carefully.

title: Compensation Benchmarking Request
prompt_text: For this [ROLE] in [GEOGRAPHY], what is the market compensation range? Consider: base salary, bonus %, benefits, and any special considerations. How does our current pay compare?
description: Ensures competitive pay to attract and retain talent.
tips: Use multiple sources (market surveys, recruiters, public data); Copilot will synthesize. Update annually; flag roles that fall behind market.

title: Benefits Program Review
prompt_text: Review our current benefits offering: [BENEFITS_SUMMARY]. Against peer companies and employee feedback, what's missing? What should we enhance? What can we reduce? Prioritize by impact and cost.
description: Optimizes benefits to meet employee needs within budget.
tips: Conduct employee survey on benefits preferences; Copilot will prioritize investments. Balance cost, utilization, and employee satisfaction.

title: Equity Plan Recommendation
prompt_text: Our startup/company is considering [EQUITY_TYPE] for retention/alignment. Compare options: stock options, RSUs, profit-sharing, ESPP. What's best for our stage, culture, and goals? Model impact on [NUMBER] employees.
description: Structures equity programs aligned with business stage and retention needs.
tips: Consider tax treatment, vesting, and market practice; Copilot will advise. Work with legal and tax before implementing.

title: Conflict Resolution Framework
prompt_text: Two employees, [EMPLOYEE_A] and [EMPLOYEE_B], have ongoing conflict about [ISSUE]. Provide a resolution approach: what information to gather, how to mediate, and next steps. Any escalation triggers?
description: Guides fair resolution of interpersonal conflicts that impact culture and performance.
tips: Listen without judgment; involve both parties. Know your escalation path (legal, ethics) for harassment or misconduct.

title: Difficult Conversation Preparation
prompt_text: I need to have a difficult conversation with [EMPLOYEE] about [ISSUE]. Prepare: key messages, anticipated reactions, de-escalation tactics, and next steps. Context: [BACKGROUND].
description: Prepares managers for sensitive employee discussions.
tips: Role-play with HR before the conversation; Copilot will help you prepare. Focus on facts, not assumptions; stay calm.

title: Training Needs Analysis
prompt_text: For [ROLE_FAMILY or DEPARTMENT], identify top training needs based on: performance gaps, skill requirements, development plans, and business strategy. Prioritize by impact and feasibility.
description: Aligns learning investments with business and employee goals.
tips: Survey employees and managers; Copilot will synthesize gaps. Prioritize high-impact, feasible topics for ROI.

title: Learning Program Design
prompt_text: Design a learning program for [TOPIC]. Audience: [AUDIENCE]. Format: [FORMAT: online, classroom, blended]. Duration: [DURATION]. Structure: modules, assessments, and reinforcement plan.
description: Blueprints learning experiences aligned with content and learner needs.
tips: Start with learning objectives; design backwards. Include pre-work, main content, assessment, and reinforcement. Copilot will suggest sequencing.

title: Leadership Development Program
prompt_text: Create a leadership development program for [LEVEL: emerging leaders, managers, senior leaders]. Include: competencies to develop, [NUMBER]-month curriculum, modalities (coaching, cohorts, projects), and success measures.
description: Builds leadership capability pipeline aligned with organizational needs.
tips: Start with leadership competency model; Copilot will map to curriculum. Include executive coaching and peer learning.

title: Pay Equity Analysis
prompt_text: Analyze pay equity across the organization. Compare salary by: role, tenure, performance rating, and demographic factors. Flag any statistically significant gaps (>5% unexplained variance). Recommend remediation priority.
description: Identifies and addresses potential pay discrimination systematically.
tips: Use statistically sound methods; Copilot will help frame. Involve legal before any external disclosure.

title: Attrition Prediction
prompt_text: Model which employees are at risk of attrition in the next [TIMEFRAME]. Use: recent behavior (engagement, performance, internal mobility), tenure, role, and external factors. Identify top [NUMBER] flight risks and retention options.
description: Enables proactive retention actions before resignations occur.
tips: Use past attrition data to calibrate model; Copilot will improve with feedback. Validate predictions against actual exits.

title: Workforce Planning Model
prompt_text: Model workforce needs for [TEAM or DEPARTMENT] over [TIMEFRAME]. Input: growth plans, productivity rates, retirement projections, attrition rates. Output: headcount requirements, hiring timeline, skills gaps, and development needs.
description: Aligns headcount planning with business strategy and talent market.
tips: Use historical data on productivity and attrition; Copilot will extrapolate. Validate with business leaders on growth assumptions.

title: Payroll Validation
prompt_text: [PAYROLL_DATA in Excel: employee list with pay, deductions, taxes]. Validate: all employees paid, no duplicate payments, deductions correct, tax withholding reasonable. Flag discrepancies and missing data.
description: Catches payroll errors before processing and ensures compliance.
tips: Run monthly as control; Copilot will flag outliers. Verify against timesheets and policy.

title: Headcount Analysis
prompt_text: [HEADCOUNT_DATA in Excel: employees by department, role, tenure, salary, location]. Summarize: headcount by org, turnover by department, cost per employee, any cost/headcount imbalances. Visualize trends.
description: Monitors workforce composition and efficiency metrics.
tips: Update monthly; Copilot will track trends. Use for budget and planning discussions.

title: Compensation Modeling
prompt_text: [COMPENSATION_DATA in Excel: roles, current salary, market benchmark, tenure]. Model scenarios: market adjustment, bonus pool, equity refresh. Show impact on headcount cost and competitiveness.
description: Scenarios compensation changes before rollout and budget submission.
tips: Build dynamic model; Copilot will help with formulas. Model best/worst/likely case for budget planning.

title: Benefits Tracking
prompt_text: [BENEFITS_DATA in Excel: employee enrollment, plan costs, utilization rates, claims]. Track: participation rates, cost per employee, plan health, trends in usage. What's over/under-utilized?
description: Monitors benefits program performance and cost efficiency.
tips: Match to HRIS; Copilot will validate enrollments. Use to guide benefits communication and optimization.

title: Compensation Benchmarking Research
prompt_text: Research market compensation for [ROLE_FAMILY] in [GEOGRAPHY]. Find: base salary range, bonus %, benefits, and trends. Include [NUMBER] credible sources (surveys, job boards, recruiters). Synthesize into a briefing.
description: Provides market intelligence for pay decisions and positioning.
tips: Copilot will search; verify sources are recent (last 12 months) and credible. Use multiple sources for confidence.

title: Regulatory Changes Tracking
prompt_text: Track employment law changes in [JURISDICTIONS] that affect us: minimum wage, leave requirements, worker classification, discrimination law. What's changed? What do we need to update? Compliance timeline?
description: Keeps HR policies current with legal requirements across markets.
tips: Set up quarterly; Copilot will find changes. Involve legal; review impact on policy and process.

title: Competitor Benefits Research
prompt_text: Research benefits offered by [NUMBER] competitors/peers in [INDUSTRY/GEOGRAPHY]. What's standard? What's differentiated? How do we compare? Gaps to address? Recommendations for staying competitive.
description: Benchmarks benefits against market to guide program decisions.
tips: Find public information (job postings, Glassdoor, company sites); Copilot will synthesize. Look for industry trends and emerging benefits.

title: Talent Review Brief
prompt_text: Prepare a quarterly talent review brief: high-potentials, flight risks, succession candidates, key development needs. Include: assessment summary, calibrated ratings, and action plan. Audience: EXEC_TEAM.
description: Synthesizes talent assessment into executive briefing for decisions.
tips: Use performance, feedback, and development data; maintain confidentiality. Present actionable recommendations.

title: Annual Compensation Analysis
prompt_text: Analyze compensation for [DIVISION/DEPARTMENT]: by role, tenure, performance, and demographics. Assess: market competitiveness, internal equity, and any pay gaps. Recommend adjustments for equity and retention.
description: Comprehensive pay analysis supporting annual cycle and equity review.
tips: Use market data and internal data; Copilot will compare. Involve legal before discussing sensitive findings.

title: Lease Abstraction
prompt_text: Summarize this lease [LEASE_NAME/REFERENCE]: landlord, tenant, sq ft, rent/year, term (start-end), renewal options, key clauses (options, escalations, maintenance). Flag any unusual terms.
description: Extracts key lease data for portfolio management and decision-making.
tips: Use lease text or summary; Copilot will synthesize. Useful for rent payment planning and renewal calendars.

title: Lease Negotiation Strategy
prompt_text: We're negotiating renewal for [LEASE/PROPERTY]. Current: [CURRENT_TERMS]. Market: [MARKET_CONDITIONS]. Landlord asking: [ASKING_TERMS]. Strategy: what to push back on, what to concede, and how to close below asking.
description: Guides lease negotiations to protect financial and operational interests.
tips: Know your BATNA (alternative space) before negotiating; Copilot will suggest leverage points. Document all assumptions.

title: Portfolio Rationalization
prompt_text: We have [NUMBER] leases across [GEOGRAPHY]. Analyze: utilization, cost/sq ft, term remaining, and strategic fit. Which should we exit, consolidate, or expand? Model the impact on cost and employee experience.
description: Identifies opportunities to optimize real estate footprint and cost.
tips: Use occupancy, headcount, and lease data; Copilot will prioritize. Model exit costs; consider strategic value of locations.

title: Rent Payment Forecasting
prompt_text: Create a rent payment forecast for [TIMEFRAME] across all leases. Include: base rent, escalations, CAM, renewals coming due, and any options to exercise. What's the cash impact? Any surprises?
description: Forecasts real estate cash obligations for financial planning.
tips: Build a model; Copilot will help structure. Update as renewals finalize.

title: Space Planning Guidance
prompt_text: For this [OFFICE/FACILITY], we're planning [PROJECT_SCOPE: expansion, reconfiguration, contraction]. Current: [CURRENT_STATE]. Goal: [GOAL: cost reduction, collaboration, flexibility]. What's the optimal layout? What trade-offs?
description: Designs workplace layouts aligned with business and employee needs.
tips: Involve employees in planning; Copilot will suggest layouts based on space needs. Consider future flexibility.

title: Occupancy Analysis
prompt_text: Analyze occupancy data for [FACILITY]: badge swipes, desk usage, conference room bookings, and employee feedback. What's the utilization? Are we over-provisioned? Any space underutilized?
description: Measures real estate utilization to guide space and cost optimization.
tips: Use real sensor data or proxy metrics; Copilot will interpret. Consider work patterns (hybrid, in-office) in analysis.

title: Workplace Flexibility Planning
prompt_text: We're moving to [WORK_MODEL: flexible, hybrid, remote]. How should we redesign [FACILITY]? Space needs, amenities, technology. What's the employee impact? Cost savings? Implementation timeline?
description: Aligns workplace design with modern work models and flexibility needs.
tips: Survey employees on work preferences; Copilot will guide design. Model cost/headcount implications.

title: Facilities Maintenance Plan
prompt_text: Create a preventive maintenance schedule for [FACILITY]. Assets: [ASSET_LIST]. Current: [CURRENT_CONDITION]. Goal: minimize downtime, extend asset life, manage costs. What maintenance should we do? When? Budget?
description: Systematizes facility maintenance to prevent costly failures and extend asset life.
tips: Use asset manuals and vendor recommendations; Copilot will build schedule. Track maintenance costs for ROI.

title: Energy Efficiency Roadmap
prompt_text: Audit [FACILITY] for energy efficiency: current consumption, benchmarks, and opportunities. Recommend: lighting upgrades, HVAC optimization, metering, and behavior change. Model payback and CO2 reduction.
description: Identifies and prioritizes energy efficiency investments with clear ROI.
tips: Start with audit data; Copilot will prioritize by payback. Include behavior change (employee engagement) in plan.

title: Vendor Management
prompt_text: Evaluate facilities vendors [VENDOR_NAMES]: service levels, response times, quality, and cost. How are they performing? Should we renegotiate, replace, or consolidate? Strategy for next contract?
description: Optimizes facilities vendor performance and cost through disciplined contracting.
tips: Track performance against SLAs; Copilot will assess. Consolidate where possible for leverage.

title: Sustainability Strategy Development
prompt_text: Develop a real estate sustainability strategy for [COMPANY/DIVISION]. Goals: [GOALS]. Current state: [CURRENT_STATE]. Recommend: priority initiatives, timeline, investment, and carbon impact. Link to business strategy.
description: Aligns real estate sustainability with business goals and stakeholder expectations.
tips: Start with materiality assessment (what matters most); Copilot will prioritize. Get stakeholder input on targets.

title: LEED/Certification Path
prompt_text: We're considering [CERTIFICATION: LEED, BREEAM, Living Building Challenge] for [FACILITY]. What's involved? Timeline? Cost? What's the business/brand value? Is it worth it?
description: Evaluates sustainability certifications for buildings vs. investment and market value.
tips: Research certification requirements; Copilot will outline process. Model cost and ROI.

title: Supply Chain Sustainability
prompt_text: Evaluate sustainability of our real estate supply chain: contractors, vendors, materials. What are the risks (labor, environment, compliance)? What standards should we require? How to enforce?
description: Ensures real estate supply chain aligns with sustainability and ethics standards.
tips: Audit vendor practices; Copilot will assess risks. Build compliance requirements into contracts.

title: Lease Cost Tables
prompt_text: [LEASE_DATA in Excel: all leases with rent, escalations, terms]. Create a model showing: annual rent by lease, cumulative annual cost, cost per sq ft trends, and any renewal dates. What's the total occupancy cost?
description: Models lease cost obligations and trends for budgeting and planning.
tips: Update as leases finalize; Copilot will maintain model. Use for rent accrual and cash forecasting.

title: Utility Tracking
prompt_text: [UTILITY_DATA in Excel: monthly electric, water, gas for each facility]. Summarize: total cost, cost per sq ft, trends, and seasonal patterns. Flag any anomalies (usage spikes, billing errors).
description: Monitors utility costs for efficiency and anomaly detection.
tips: Benchmark vs. industry; Copilot will spot outliers. Use for efficiency planning.

title: Occupancy Rate Tracking
prompt_text: [OCCUPANCY_DATA in Excel: facility, capacity, current occupancy, trends over time]. Calculate: occupancy rate (%), utilization trend, and cost per employee. Is space being used effectively?
description: Tracks real estate utilization for space and cost optimization.
tips: Use badge data or survey; Copilot will calculate efficiency. Compare across facilities and time.

title: Market Rent Analysis
prompt_text: Research market rent for [ASSET_TYPE] in [MARKET]. What's the current rate per sq ft? Trends? Competitive inventory? This data informs renewal negotiations and lease decisions.
description: Benchmarks your lease costs against market for negotiation positioning.
tips: Find recent comps in your market; Copilot will synthesize. Use for negotiation leverage.

title: Sustainability Regulations
prompt_text: Research building sustainability regulations in [JURISDICTIONS]: energy codes, emissions limits, water conservation, certifications required. What's changing? What do we need to comply with?
description: Keeps real estate operations compliant with evolving regulations and standards.
tips: Set up quarterly tracking; Copilot will find changes. Involve legal/compliance.

title: Smart Building Technology
prompt_text: Research smart building technologies that could improve [FACILITY]: IoT sensors, energy management, space management, security. What's available? Cost? ROI? Implementation considerations?
description: Identifies technology investments to optimize facility operations and experience.
tips: Evaluate based on your facility and priorities; Copilot will research options. Pilot before scaling.

title: Energy Forecasting
prompt_text: Forecast [FACILITY] energy consumption for [TIMEFRAME] based on: historical usage, efficiency upgrades planned, weather patterns, and occupancy. Model: best case (efficiency wins), base case, and worst case.
description: Predicts energy costs and impact of efficiency initiatives for budgeting.
tips: Use historical data and audit findings; Copilot will extrapolate. Update forecasts as efficiency projects complete.

title: ROI Modeling for Investments
prompt_text: Model ROI for a real estate investment [PROJECT_DESCRIPTION]: capital cost, payback, net present value, and intangible benefits (employee experience, sustainability). Should we invest?
description: Quantifies business case for real estate projects and prioritizes investment.
tips: Build financial model with assumptions; Copilot will calculate. Sensitivity test key variables (discount rate, payback period).

title: Quarterly Portfolio Review
prompt_text: Prepare a quarterly real estate portfolio review: occupancy, cost, lease expiries, key issues, and recommendations. Audience: CFO/CEO. Include: YoY comparison, trend analysis, and action items.
description: Executive briefing on real estate performance and strategic initiatives.
tips: Use portfolio data, lease schedule, and market intelligence; Copilot will synthesize. Flag lease renewals and expiries coming due.

title: Campaign Strategy Development
prompt_text: Develop a campaign strategy for [CAMPAIGN_NAME]: goal, audience, key message, channels, timeline, and budget. Competitive landscape: [LANDSCAPE]. How will we stand out? What's the call-to-action?
description: Blueprints campaign execution aligned with business objectives and audience.
tips: Define campaign goal (awareness, consideration, conversion); Copilot will structure. Validate against audience insights.

title: Content Refinement
prompt_text: Review this marketing content [PIECE]: [CONTENT]. Improve: clarity, persuasiveness, brand voice, call-to-action, and fit with audience. Preserve message intent; tighten by [%].
description: Enhances content for greater impact and engagement.
tips: Describe target audience and conversion goal; Copilot will optimize for impact. A/B test versions if possible.

title: Market Research Synthesis
prompt_text: Synthesize market research on [TOPIC/MARKET]: [RESEARCH_SOURCES]. What are customer needs, pain points, buying criteria, and trends? How should this shape our strategy?
description: Translates research into actionable market insights and strategy.
tips: Use primary research (surveys, interviews) and secondary (reports, articles); Copilot will synthesize. Look for signals of shifting needs.

title: Competitive Positioning
prompt_text: Analyze competitive landscape for [MARKET/SEGMENT]: who are competitors, their positioning, strengths/weaknesses, and market share. Where's the opportunity for us? How do we differentiate?
description: Identifies competitive opportunities and positions offerings for advantage.
tips: Use public sources (websites, press, reviews) and customer feedback; Copilot will assess. Map positioning against key dimensions (price, quality, service).

title: Customer Segment Analysis
prompt_text: We're targeting these customer segments: [SEGMENTS]. For each, analyze: size, growth, needs, buying behavior, and willingness to pay. Recommend: which to focus on? Why?
description: Prioritizes market segments for focus and resource allocation.
tips: Use market research, customer data, and sales insights; Copilot will assess attractiveness. Score by size, growth, margins.

title: Pricing Strategy"
prompt_text: For [PRODUCT/SERVICE], develop pricing strategy. Current: [CURRENT_PRICING]. Competitors: [COMPETITOR_PRICES]. Customer value perception: [VALUE]. Recommend: price point, bundling, and promotional approach.
description: Optimizes pricing for competitive advantage and revenue growth.
tips: Use value-based pricing where possible (not just cost+); Copilot will structure. Validate with customers before launch.

title: Brand Guidelines Review
prompt_text: Review this brand asset [ASSET] against our guidelines: [BRAND_GUIDE_SUMMARY]. Does it align? Any tone, visual, or messaging issues? How should we fix it?
description: Ensures brand consistency across touchpoints and reinforces identity.
tips: Use official brand guide; Copilot will spot deviations. Build templates for consistency across teams.

title: Crisis Communication Plan
prompt_text: Prepare a crisis communication plan: anticipated crises for [COMPANY/INDUSTRY], response templates, approval chains, and key messages. How will we respond quickly while protecting reputation?
description: Prepares organization for reputation-threatening situations.
tips: Identify credible crisis scenarios; Copilot will draft response templates. Align with legal/compliance on messaging.

title: Stakeholder Communication"
prompt_text: Plan internal/external communications for [INITIATIVE/NEWS]. Stakeholders: [STAKEHOLDERS]. Key message: [MESSAGE]. Channels/timing: [PLAN]. How to manage expectations and concerns?
description: Coordinates stakeholder communication to ensure alignment and understanding.
tips: Tailor message for each stakeholder type; Copilot will help. Anticipate concerns and address proactively.

title: Employee Advocacy Program
prompt_text: Design an employee advocacy program: goal (amplify reach? brand awareness?), content, incentives, and ease of participation. How will employees share and what should they say?
description: Mobilizes employees as authentic brand ambassadors for greater reach.
tips: Make it easy to participate; provide content and talking points. Track participation and impact; celebrate advocates.

title: Campaign ROI Tracking
prompt_text: [CAMPAIGN_DATA in Excel: spend by channel, impressions, clicks, conversions, revenue]. Calculate: ROI by channel, cost per conversion, payback period. Which channels are driving value?
description: Measures campaign effectiveness and guides budget allocation.
tips: Connect spend to conversions and revenue; Copilot will calculate ROI. Use for channel optimization.

title: Media Spend Allocation
prompt_text: [SPEND_DATA in Excel: historical spend by channel and performance]. Model: if we shift [X]% budget from Channel A to Channel B, what's the impact on ROI and reach? Recommend optimal allocation.
description: Optimizes budget allocation based on channel performance.
tips: Use historical performance data; Copilot will model scenarios. Validate assumptions with team.

title: Content Calendar Tracking
prompt_text: [CONTENT_DATA in Excel: planned and published content by date, type, channel, performer (views, engagement, conversions)]. Track: publication rate, performance trends. What content resonates?
description: Monitors content production and performance for optimization.
tips: Update weekly; Copilot will track trends. Use for future content planning.

title: Competitive Positioning Research
prompt_text: Research competitors in [MARKET]: positioning, messaging, pricing, recent campaigns. What are they emphasizing? Where's our differentiation opportunity?
description: Synthesizes competitive intelligence to inform positioning strategy.
tips: Use public sources and customer feedback; Copilot will synthesize. Monitor competitor activity regularly.

title: Industry Trends Research
prompt_text: Research trends in [INDUSTRY/MARKET]: emerging technologies, customer preferences, competitive landscape changes. What should we be watching? What's an opportunity? What's a threat?
description: Identifies industry shifts and emerging opportunities for strategy.
tips: Monitor industry publications, analyst reports, and customer feedback; Copilot will synthesize trends. Anticipate impact on business.

title: Customer Audience Research
prompt_text: Research your target customers for [SEGMENT]: demographics, psychographics, needs, pain points, media consumption, buying behavior. What resonates with them?
description: Deepens customer understanding to guide messaging and channel strategy.
tips: Use surveys, interviews, social listening, and reviews; Copilot will synthesize. Validate assumptions with direct customer conversations.

title: Attribution Modeling
prompt_text: Model how different marketing touchpoints contribute to conversion for [CAMPAIGN/PRODUCT]. Use: first-touch, last-touch, and multi-touch attribution. What's the true ROI of each channel?
description: Clarifies channel contribution to conversion for smarter budget allocation.
tips: Use customer journey data; Copilot will model attribution. Multi-touch is more accurate but complex; start there.

title: Customer Lifetime Value Analysis
prompt_text: Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) for [CUSTOMER_SEGMENT]. Input: acquisition cost, average annual spend, margin, churn rate, and growth. What's the ROI of acquiring this segment?
description: Quantifies customer value to guide acquisition and retention investment.
tips: Use historical customer data; Copilot will calculate CLV. Use for CAC (customer acquisition cost) benchmarking.

title: Campaign Optimization
prompt_text: Optimize [CAMPAIGN]: A/B test results, audience segments, messaging variations, and channel mix. What combinations drove best results? Recommendations for next iteration?
description: Identifies winning campaign elements for replication and scaling.
tips: Use experimental data; Copilot will identify patterns. Validate before scaling; statistically significant results matter.

title: Quarterly Campaign Review
prompt_text: Prepare a quarterly marketing review: campaigns launched, performance vs. goals, learnings, and recommendations for next quarter. Audience: CMO/CEO. Include: ROI, key metrics, and strategic insights.
description: Executive briefing on marketing performance and strategic initiatives.
tips: Use campaign data, performance analytics, and strategic context; Copilot will synthesize. Include competitive and market context.

title: Brand Strategy Brief
prompt_text: Develop a brand strategy brief: current positioning, target audience, desired perception, key messages, and brand experience. How should we evolve to stay relevant? What's our brand promise?
description: Comprehensive brand strategy guiding all marketing and communications.
tips: Use customer research, competitive analysis, and brand assessment; Copilot will synthesize. Validate with leadership and customers.

title: Market Entry Strategy
prompt_text: Plan market entry for [MARKET/GEOGRAPHY]: opportunity assessment, target segments, competitive landscape, go-to-market strategy, and resource plan. When should we enter? How?
description: Comprehensive plan for entering new markets successfully.
tips: Use market research, competitive intelligence, and resource assessment; Copilot will structure. Validate with cross-functional team.

title: Content Strategy Plan
prompt_text: Develop a [TIMEFRAME] content strategy: goals, audience segments, content themes, distribution channels, production plan, and success metrics. How will content support business objectives?
description: Strategic framework for content production and distribution.
tips: Use audience research, business goals, and content inventory; Copilot will synthesize. Build editorial calendar from strategy.

title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard
prompt_text: Create a vendor evaluation scorecard for [VENDOR_ROLE]: criteria (quality, price, terms, service, innovation), weights, and rating scale. Score [VENDOR_NAMES]. Who's the best fit for [USE_CASE]?
description: Standardizes vendor evaluation to ensure fair comparison and good choices.
tips: Include cost and non-cost criteria; weight by importance. Involve stakeholders in defining criteria.

title: Contract Analysis Checklist
prompt_text: Review this vendor contract [CONTRACT]: terms, pricing, liability, IP, and termination clauses. Flag risks, unfavorable terms, and negotiation opportunities. Recommend changes for [YOUR_PRIORITY].
description: Identifies contract risks and opportunities for negotiation.
tips: Use company standard templates; Copilot will highlight deviations. Involve legal for complex contracts.

title: Vendor Consolidation Strategy
prompt_text: We have [NUMBER] vendors for [CATEGORY]. Consolidation opportunity: reduce count to [TARGET], increase volume discounts, and improve management. Which vendors to keep? Consolidation roadmap?
description: Simplifies vendor portfolio for cost savings and relationship management.
tips: Analyze spend, performance, and strategic fit; Copilot will recommend. Plan transition carefully to avoid disruption.

title: Spend Analysis
prompt_text: Analyze spend for [CATEGORY]: total spend, top vendors, trends, and opportunities. Where can we reduce cost or consolidate? Any contracts expiring? Risk in this category?
description: Maps spending to identify optimization and risk management opportunities.
tips: Use spend data by vendor, commodity, and time; Copilot will categorize. Identify quick wins and strategic opportunities.

title: RFx Response Review
prompt_text: We sent an RFP/RFQ for [CATEGORY]. Responses received from [NUMBER] vendors. Analyze: completeness of responses, price competitiveness, capability fit, and recommendation for next round.
description: Streamlines RFx evaluation and supports supplier selection decision.
tips: Score against RFP criteria; Copilot will compare. Prepare negotiations with top vendors.

title: RFP Development
prompt_text: Create an RFP for [CATEGORY/SERVICE]: requirements, scope, evaluation criteria, timeline, and contract terms. What should we ask vendors to demonstrate capability and fit?
description: Structures vendor solicitation to ensure quality responses and fair evaluation.
tips: Start with requirements and success criteria; Copilot will build RFP structure. Circulate to stakeholders for input.

title: Vendor Scorecard
prompt_text: [VENDOR_DATA in Excel: vendor names, performance metrics (quality, on-time delivery, responsiveness, innovation), and scores]. Summarize: top performers, underperformers, and performance trends.
description: Tracks vendor performance for continuous improvement and risk management.
tips: Update quarterly; Copilot will flag trends. Use for performance discussions and contract renewals.

title: Spend Category Analysis
prompt_text: [SPEND_DATA in Excel: by vendor, category, time]. Analyze: top categories, top vendors, spend trends, and savings opportunities. Where's the biggest spend? What's growing? What can we reduce?
description: Identifies spend patterns and opportunities for targeted procurement initiatives.
tips: Categorize spend consistently; Copilot will rank by opportunity. Use for strategic sourcing decisions.

title: Supplier Intelligence Research
prompt_text: Research supplier [SUPPLIER_NAME/CATEGORY]: financial health, ownership, capabilities, certifications, customer references, risk factors. Should we diversify suppliers in this category?
description: Assesses supplier viability and risk for relationship and continuity planning.
tips: Use public sources, credit reports, and customer reviews; Copilot will synthesize. Monitor for changes in supplier health.

title: Annual Vendor Review
prompt_text: Prepare an annual vendor review: performance summary, cost trend, risk assessment, and recommendations (continue, consolidate, replace, or expand). Audience: procurement leadership.
description: Executive briefing on vendor portfolio health and strategic actions.
tips: Use vendor scorecard, spend data, and market intelligence; Copilot will synthesize. Include action items.

title: Category Strategy
prompt_text: Develop sourcing strategy for [CATEGORY]: market analysis, competitive landscape, supplier options, and recommended approach (single-source, multi-source, insource). Cost target? Timeline?
description: Strategic sourcing plan for major spend categories.
tips: Use market research, spend analysis, and business requirements; Copilot will synthesize. Validate with stakeholders.

title: Contract Portfolio Review
prompt_text: Review [CATEGORY] contract portfolio: terms, pricing, expirations, risk factors, and recommendations. Which contracts need renegotiation? When? What are the goals?
description: Comprehensive portfolio management to identify renewal and renegotiation opportunities.
tips: Use contract data and market intelligence; Copilot will assess. Prioritize based on spend and expiry.

title: Draft from Notes
prompt_text: I have notes from [EVENT_TYPE]: [NOTES]. Draft content about [TOPIC] for [AUDIENCE]. Style: [STYLE]. Length: [LENGTH]. Capture the key insights and make it engaging.
description: Converts raw notes into publishable content assets efficiently.
tips: Organize notes by theme first; Copilot will draft. Review for accuracy and consistency.

title: Compare Content Versions
prompt_text: Compare these [NUMBER] versions of [CONTENT]: [VERSION_DETAILS]. What's different? Which version is stronger and why? How should we merge or choose?
description: Evaluates alternative drafts to select or combine the strongest elements.
tips: Score each on clarity, persuasiveness, and fit; Copilot will compare. Use for collaborative writing.

title: Consolidate Feedback
prompt_text: I've gathered feedback on this draft [DRAFT] from [NUMBER] reviewers: [FEEDBACK_SUMMARY]. Consolidate feedback: common themes, conflicts, and recommendations. How should I revise?
description: Synthesizes multiple feedback inputs into coherent revision guidance.
tips: Categorize feedback (critical, important, nice-to-have); Copilot will prioritize. Resolve conflicts by asking for clarification.

title: Polish Final Draft
prompt_text: Polish this [CONTENT_TYPE] for publication: review for flow, clarity, tone, impact, and brand alignment. Make it ready for [PUBLISHER/AUDIENCE]. Tighten by [%] without losing substance.
description: Final edit before publication to ensure quality and consistency.
tips: Review for typos, grammar, consistency; Copilot will polish. Have fresh eyes review before publishing.

title: Publication Review Checklist
prompt_text: This [CONTENT_TYPE] is ready for publication. Checklist: headline compelling? Message clear? Call-to-action present? Brand voice consistent? Links/images working? Any errors or issues?
description: Pre-publication quality and compliance check.
tips: Use a checklist to ensure consistency; Copilot will help. Get second review if high-stakes content.

title: Create from Notes
prompt_text: I have meeting notes/talking points: [NOTES]. Create a [LENGTH]-slide presentation outline for [AUDIENCE]. Structure: [STRUCTURE: narrative arc, problem-solution, etc.]. Key messages: [MESSAGES].
description: Scaffolds presentation from raw notes quickly.
tips: Provide main talking points; Copilot will suggest slide structure. Use this as outline; you fill in details and visuals.

title: Create from Document
prompt_text: I have a document [DOCUMENT] about [TOPIC]. Create a [LENGTH]-slide presentation for [AUDIENCE] that: distills key insights, tells a compelling story, and drives [CALL_TO_ACTION].
description: Extracts narrative from long-form content for presentation format.
tips: Identify core story first; Copilot will map to slides. Remove jargon and detail; presentations are navigation aids, not documents.

title: Create from Transcript
prompt_text: I have a transcript of [EVENT_TYPE]: [TRANSCRIPT]. Create a [LENGTH]-slide presentation for [AUDIENCE] that captures: key message, supporting evidence, and next steps.
description: Transforms spoken word into presentation narrative and structure.
tips: Identify main narrative and key quotes; Copilot will structure slides. Remove digressions and filler.

title: Update Existing Presentation
prompt_text: This presentation [DECK_DETAILS] needs updating for [REASON: new data, changed situation, different audience]. What slides change? What new slides do we need? How to maintain flow?
description: Guides iterative presentation updates without starting from scratch.
tips: Identify what changed (data, audience, message) first; Copilot will suggest updates. Preserve core narrative.

title: Improve Visuals
prompt_text: This presentation has [CURRENT_STATE: walls of text, dated visuals, poor charts]. Redesign for visual impact: cleaner layouts, better charts, compelling imagery, and clearer hierarchy.
description: Enhances visual design for engagement and clarity.
tips: Use white space; one idea per slide. Replace complex tables with clear charts; use visuals to support narrative.

title: Restructure Presentation
prompt_text: This presentation [CURRENT_STRUCTURE] needs restructuring for [NEW_AUDIENCE or GOAL]. How should we reorder? What emphasizes [KEY_MESSAGE]? What can we remove or combine?
description: Reorganizes existing content for better impact with new context or audience.
tips: Identify core narrative; Copilot will suggest better flow. Test new structure with audience to validate.

title: Speaker Notes
prompt_text: Create speaker notes for this [LENGTH]-slide presentation on [TOPIC]. Each slide should have: main talking point, supporting detail, timing (~[DURATION] per slide), and transitions to next slide.
description: Provides presenter guidance for confident delivery.
tips: Write notes in conversational tone; Copilot will structure. Practice with notes to refine timing.

title: Summarize Inbox
prompt_text: I've received [NUMBER] emails about [TOPIC/PERIOD]: [EMAIL_SUMMARIES]. Summarize the inbox: what's the overall message, key concerns, and action items? Do I need to respond to each?
description: Distills email volume into clear takeaways and actions.
tips: Copilot works best with message subjects and key excerpts; full emails not needed. Flag urgent/escalated items.

title: Categorize by Theme
prompt_text: I have [NUMBER] emails about [GENERAL_TOPIC]. Organize by theme: what clusters of emails are there? What's the priority of each cluster? Any cross-cutting issues?
description: Identifies themes and priorities across email volume.
tips: Group by sender, topic, or urgency; Copilot will suggest useful categorizations. Use for inbox priority.

title: Identify Urgent
prompt_text: From this email batch [EMAIL_SUMMARIES], flag urgent/escalated items: what requires immediate response? What can wait? What should I escalate? What can I delegate?
description: Surfaces time-sensitive issues in email volume.
tips: Look for keywords (urgent, escalated, overdue) and sender seniority; Copilot will flag. Review urgent items first.

title: Propose Responses
prompt_text: From this batch of emails [EMAILS], propose responses: what should I say to each sender? Keep responses short and actionable. What needs escalation vs. what I can handle?
description: Jumpstarts email responses to clear inbox efficiently.
tips: Draft one response template per sender group; Copilot will suggest. Personalize before sending.

title: Auto-Organize
prompt_text: This inbox has [NUMBER] emails across [TIMEFRAME]. Suggest filing/archiving strategy: what should stay in inbox? What should be archived? Create folder structure for [TOPIC_AREAS].
description: Designs email organization system for easier retrieval and review.
tips: Identify actionable vs. reference emails; archive reference. Create logical folder structure for quick filing.

title: Weekly Digest
prompt_text: Create a weekly email digest from my inbox [INBOX_SUMMARY]: what happened this week, what requires action, and what I should monitor. Format: brief, scannable, actionable.
description: Converts email volume into weekly briefing for communication partners.
tips: Aggregate themes and actions; Copilot will synthesize. Send at consistent time (Friday or Monday morning).

title: HR FAQ Bot
prompt_text: Design an HR FAQ bot in Copilot Studio that answers: policy questions, benefits info, leave requests, career development, and escalation to HR for complex issues. Knowledge base: [POLICIES].
description: Self-service HR support reducing tickets to HR team.
tips: Build in knowledge base with HR policies and FAQs; Copilot Studio will handle routing. Include escalation for edge cases.

title: Procurement Intake Agent
prompt_text: Design a procurement intake agent that: gathers requirements (what are we sourcing?), vendor preferences, budget, timeline, and compliance needs. Routes to appropriate sourcing path. Escalates complex requests.
description: Streamlines procurement request intake and routing.
tips: Build intake flow with conditional logic; Copilot Studio will handle multi-turn conversation. Connect to procurement system.

title: Facilities Request Agent
prompt_text: Design a facilities request agent that: gathers request type (maintenance, space, amenities), location, urgency, and contact info. Categorizes and routes to facilities team. Provides status updates.
description: Automates facilities request intake and initial routing.
tips: Build request categorization logic; Copilot Studio will handle routing. Track requests in connected system.

title: Marketing Brief Generator
prompt_text: Design an agent that helps teams generate marketing briefs. Gathers: campaign goal, audience, key message, timeline, and budget. Generates a brief template ready for review. Integrates with approval workflow.
description: Accelerates marketing brief creation with consistency.
tips: Build multi-turn conversation flow; Copilot Studio will guide. Generate structured output (brief template).

title: Mailbox Triage Agent
prompt_text: Design an agent that triages incoming emails: summarizes, categorizes by urgency/theme, identifies action items, and suggests responses. Works with email plugin. Reduces manual inbox work.
description: Automates email triage and prioritization.
tips: Build categorization and summarization logic; Copilot Studio will integrate with email. Keep summaries concise.

title: Testing and Validation Pattern
prompt_text: Design a testing approach for a Copilot Studio agent: test cases (happy path, edge cases, escalation), evaluation criteria, and iteration workflow. How to validate before launch?
description: Ensures agent quality before production.
tips: Build test cases covering main and edge scenarios; Copilot Studio will help. Get feedback from pilot users.

title: Guardrail and Safety Pattern
prompt_text: Design guardrails for [AGENT_TYPE]: what should the agent refuse (e.g., policy exceptions, confidential data)? How to detect out-of-scope requests? When to escalate to human?
description: Ensures agent operates safely and within policy.
tips: Build intent classification and confidence checks; Copilot Studio will handle. Test guardrails thoroughly.

title: Escalation and Handoff Pattern
prompt_text: Design escalation workflow for an agent: when should requests go to humans (complex, out-of-scope)? How to ensure smooth handoff? What context to pass? How to track escalations?
description: Ensures seamless human handoff when agent can't help.
tips: Build escalation criteria and context passing; Copilot Studio will route. Track escalation quality for improvements.

title: Multi-Step Analysis Chain
prompt_text: Step 1: Analyze [DATA_SET] for [KEY_METRICS] — summarize current performance. Step 2: Identify trends across [TIME_PERIOD] — flag inflection points. Step 3: Benchmark against [COMPARISON_BASELINE]. Step 4: Forecast [METRIC] for next [PERIOD] using trend data. Format each step as a separate section with findings and a confidence rating.
description: Breaks complex analysis into sequential notebook cells for deep investigation combining data analysis and trend detection and forecasting.
tips: Works well with structured data tables. Use Copy-Paste from Excel to bring data into Copilot. Each step builds on previous findings. Add your own data sources inline.

title: Research Synthesis Deep Dive
prompt_text: Synthesize [NUMBER] research sources on [TOPIC]. Structure: 1) Key Findings (table format), 2) Consensus Points across sources, 3) Areas of Disagreement (with source attribution), 4) Knowledge Gaps, 5) Recommended Next Steps. Cite each source by name and date.
description: Consolidates diverse research into a single source of truth with clear differentiation between consensus and outliers.
tips: Paste abstracts or short excerpts and label each source (e.g. McKinsey 2024 or Gartner 2023). Copilot works best when sources are clearly separated.

title: Scenario Planning & Modeling
prompt_text: Create three scenarios for [DECISION_POINT]: Optimistic, Base Case, and Pessimistic. For each scenario: 1) Key Assumptions, 2) Driving Factors, 3) Projected Outcomes (table), 4) Top Risks, 5) Required Actions. Include a comparison summary table across all three scenarios.
description: Maps decision trees and contingency planning in an interactive notebook format to help leadership prepare for multiple futures.
tips: Set up a simple dependency map upfront. Use notebook tables to organize outcomes. Include leading and lagging indicators for each scenario.

title: Competitive Intelligence Brief
prompt_text: Build a competitive landscape analysis for [COMPETITORS]. Create a matrix with columns: Competitor | Key Strengths | Weaknesses | Market Position | Pricing Approach | Innovation Areas. Add sections for: Market Trends, Threats to Our Position, and Strategic Opportunities.
description: Consolidates competitive landscape into a single living document that can be regularly updated as market conditions change.
tips: Paste in recent press releases or earnings call summaries or website data. Copilot will parse and structure into matrix. Keep source links for future reference.

title: Compliance & Risk Review
prompt_text: Review [DOCUMENT_TYPE or REGULATION] for compliance gaps. Structure: 1) Requirement Summary (table: Requirement | Current Status | Gap | Mitigation), 2) Priority Risks ranked High/Medium/Low, 3) Remediation Plan with owners, 4) Implementation Timeline with milestones.
description: Ensures regulatory and internal policy adherence with clear tracking of remediation actions and accountability.
tips: Include regulation titles and version dates. Copilot flags missing clauses. Useful for SOC2 GDPR and internal policy reviews.

title: Training Program Design
prompt_text: Design a training program on [TOPIC] for [AUDIENCE]. Structure: 1) Learning Objectives by level (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced), 2) Module Breakdown (table: Module | Duration | Key Concepts | Assessment Method), 3) Resource Links, 4) Success Metrics and KPIs.
description: Creates structured learning programs that scale across teams and track progress against knowledge gaps.
tips: Define target skill level and time constraints upfront. Copilot adapts depth accordingly. Include links to internal wikis or external resources as reference materials.

title: Project Health Dashboard
prompt_text: Build a project status notebook for [PROJECT_NAME]: 1) Executive Summary with RAG status, 2) Milestone Tracker (table: Milestone | Due Date | Status | Owner), 3) Risk Register (Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation), 4) Budget and Timeline Trends, 5) Blockers and Next Steps.
description: Live project tracking in Copilot Notebooks with real-time dashboard-style reporting fed by project data.
tips: Link to project management tools or paste snapshots. Copilot will structure and highlight risks. Update weekly for best results.

title: Customer Journey Mapping
prompt_text: Map the customer journey for [PRODUCT_OR_SERVICE]: 1) Touchpoints (table: Stage | Interaction | Channel | Sentiment), 2) Pain Points by Stage, 3) Moments of Truth, 4) Improvement Opportunities ranked by impact, 5) Owner and Timeline for each improvement.
description: Visualizes end-to-end customer experience and identifies high-impact improvement areas for product and service teams.
tips: Use customer feedback and support ticket data and user research. Copilot will synthesize into journey map. Flag emotional highs and lows for prioritization.

title: Financial Analysis & Forecasting
prompt_text: Analyze financial performance for [ENTITY_OR_PERIOD]: 1) Key Metrics (Revenue, EBITDA, FCF, Key Ratios), 2) Trend Analysis over [PERIODS], 3) Variance Analysis (Actual vs. Budget), 4) Forecast for next [PERIOD] with assumptions, 5) Risks and Opportunities.
description: Executive-ready financial briefing combining trends and variances and forward-looking projections in one notebook.
tips: Paste financial statements as tables. Copilot extracts metrics and calculates trend ratios. Useful for board reports and investor updates.

title: SWOT & Strategic Positioning
prompt_text: Conduct a SWOT analysis for [ENTITY_OR_INITIATIVE]: Build a 4-quadrant matrix (Strengths | Weaknesses | Opportunities | Threats) with 5-7 items per quadrant. Synthesize into: 1) Key Strategic Themes, 2) Priority Actions, 3) Required Capabilities and Resources.
description: Structured strategic assessment that feeds into planning and resource allocation decisions.
tips: Involve 2-3 stakeholders in the SWOT brainstorm and paste their inputs. Copilot consolidates and identifies strategic priorities. Output drives roadmap.

title: Organizational Design & Restructuring
prompt_text: Design org structure for [TEAM_OR_DEPARTMENT]: 1) Current State (org chart and headcount), 2) Proposed Structure (chart and FTE impact), 3) Role Definitions (table: Title | Responsibilities | Seniority | Reporting Line), 4) Transition Plan with timeline, 5) Cost Impact Analysis.
description: Supports organizational redesign with clear change impact and cost and headcount shift tracking.
tips: Build current org chart in a table format. Copilot will draft proposed structure options and cost calculations. Include compensation ranges for accuracy.

title: Succession Planning & Bench Strength
prompt_text: Plan succession for [ROLE_OR_TEAM]: 1) Current State (incumbent tenure and performance), 2) Internal Bench (candidates with skill assessment), 3) Development Plans (table: Candidate | Skill Gap | Timeline | Sponsor), 4) External Contingency Plan, 5) Execution Timeline and Milestones.
description: Ensures leadership continuity and identifies high-potential talent for targeted development investment.
tips: Use HR system data including performance ratings and tenure. Copilot forecasts bench strength. Flag critical knowledge transfer requirements early.

title: Space Optimization & Utilization
prompt_text: Analyze space utilization for [BUILDING_OR_FLOOR]: 1) Current State (sq ft by function and occupancy rate and cost per sq ft), 2) Utilization Benchmarks (industry comparison), 3) Optimization Scenarios (table: Scenario | Headcount | Sq Ft | Cost), 4) Recommendations with ROI calculation.
description: Drives CRE efficiency and cost reduction and supports facilities planning and lease negotiation decisions.
tips: Pull utilization data from access systems or facilities management tools. Copilot will model optimization scenarios and calculate projected savings.

title: Lease Portfolio Review
prompt_text: Consolidate lease portfolio: 1) Portfolio Summary (total sq ft and annual rent and expiration profile), 2) Lease Schedule (table: Location | Sq Ft | Rate | Expiration | Renewal Status), 3) Upcoming Expirations (next 24 months), 4) Renegotiation Opportunities, 5) Risk Summary.
description: Tracks full portfolio and flags renewal deadlines to avoid service disruptions or missed negotiation windows.
tips: Export from lease management system (Yardi or Argus or Excel). Copilot will organize and highlight risks. Track renewal status quarterly.

title: Go-to-Market Strategy
prompt_text: Develop GTM plan for [PRODUCT_OR_SERVICE]: 1) Market Sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), 2) Competitive Positioning Map, 3) Channel and Pricing Strategy, 4) Campaign Plan (timeline and budget and KPIs), 5) Success Metrics and Launch Milestones.
description: Full go-to-market strategy in one notebook aligning product and marketing and sales teams on execution priorities.
tips: Provide market research and competitor analysis and product spec as inputs. Copilot will synthesize into GTM playbook. Include budget constraints for realism.

title: Customer Segmentation & Targeting
prompt_text: Segment customer base for [PRODUCT_OR_MARKET]: 1) Segment Definition (table: Segment | Size | Revenue Contribution | Key Traits), 2) Psychographics and Behaviors, 3) Value Prop by Segment, 4) Channel Strategy by Segment, 5) Acquisition and Retention Levers.
description: Data-driven segmentation for targeted marketing and product development with clear activation pathways.
